skills.name: Soul Fox Shikigami
skills.description: Summon a Soul Fox Shikigami. The summoned Soul Fox Shikigami follows you while automatically attacking nearby enemies. Enemies attacking the caster will be targeted first by the Soul Fox Shikigami.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2 per 10 seconds
Casting Time: 1.5 seconds
Duration: 60 seconds

skills.name: Greenwood Shikigami
skills.description: Summon a Tree Shikigami. The summoned Shikigami sprouts from the ground, dealing continuous damage and pulling in nearby enemies. Once fully grown, the Shikigami disappears and slows down the enemies around it.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 10
Casting Time: 1.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Howling White Tiger
skills.description: Release the roar of the White Tiger (Metal Shikigami) to instill fear in nearby enemies. Enemy affected by the roar receives damage and is struck with [Fear] for 7 seconds and Stun for 1 second.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Casting Time: 0.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Wind Shikigami
skills.description: Invoke the power of the Wind Shikigami to summon strong wind currents and attack enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Casting time: 1 second
Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Toyou
skills.description: Invoke the power of the Earth Shikigami and unleash its force on the ground below your enemies, dealing damage. Knocked down enemies receive half the damage, but have a chance of being immobilized.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Casting Time: 1 second
Duration: 3 seconds
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio
10% chance of inflicting [Hold] on fallen enemies

skills.name: Yin Yang Harmony
skills.description: Generates strong energy from the harmony of Yin and Yang. The power generated by the harmony of Yin and Yang deals with quick alternating hits of Psychokinesis property, Non property, and Earth property to the enemy. Channeling of the skill cannot be interrupted, and the caster remains immune to knockback and knockdown while Yin and Yang are in harmony.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.1 seconds
Maximum Duration: 3 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio

attributes.name: Soul Fox Shikigami: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Soul Fox Shikigami] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Greenwood Shikigami: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Greenwood Shikigami] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Greenwood Shikigami: Poison
attributes.description:
* Enemies affected by the [Greenwood Shikigami] debuff

receives damage equivalent to the skill's attack every 0.9 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Howling White Tiger: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Howling White Tiger] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Howling White Tiger: Virtuous Roar
attributes.description:
* Increases the movement speed of nearby party members by 10 for 10 sec when [Howling White Tiger] is cast

* Increases SP consumption by 100%

attributes.name: Wind Shikigami: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Wind Shikigami] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Toyou: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Toyou] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Toyou: Debris
attributes.description: * 20% chance per attribute level of applying [Toyou] to Flying enemies as well

attributes.name: Yin Yang Harmony: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Yin Yang Harmony] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Yin Yang Harmony: Heaven and Earth
attributes.description: * Reverse the energy of yin and yang, causing it to deal double the number of hits, but decreases the size of the magic circle.
